description: SQL injection via string concatenation in query builder
diff:
--- a/db.py
+++ b/db.py
@@ -12,3 +12,6 @@ class UserRepo:
     def find_by_name(self, name):
-        return self.db.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?", (name,))
+        query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '" + name + "'"
+        return self.db.execute(query)

mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":false,"issues":[{"check":"SQL injection via string concatenation","verdict":"User input directly concatenated into SQL query, replacing parameterized query","fix":"Revert to parameterized query: execute(\"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?\", (name,))","severity":"critical","confidence":"high","category":"security","file":"db.py","line_hint":"14"}],"summary":"Critical SQL injection vulnerability introduced by replacing parameterized query with string concatenation"}
